languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, прибыло сообщение от магоса Тау-Фи-0098. Он сообщает, что исследования дали результат, и наконец-то появился шанс обезопасить владения Омниссии. Думаю, это он про колонию на Заркове".

"Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, прибыло сообщение от магоса Тау-Фи-0098. Он сообщает, что исследования дали результат, и наконец-то появился шанс обезопасить владения Омниссии. Думаю, это он про колонию на Заркове".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."

"Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."

"Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."

languages.text: 「大佐、マゴス・タウ・フィ・0098から電報が届きました。彼の研究で成果が得られ、ついにオムニシアスの所有物を確保するチャンスが訪れたと報告しています。おそらくザルコフのコロニーのことでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: 「大佐、マゴス・タウ・フィ・0098から電報が届きました。彼の研究で成果が得られ、ついにオムニシアスの所有物を確保するチャンスが訪れたと報告しています。おそらくザルコフのコロニーのことでしょう。」

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, ha llegado un mensaje del magos Tau-Fi-0098. Informa de que su investigación ha producido algunos resultados, y que por fin hay una posibilidad de asegurar las posesiones del Omnissiah. Creo que se refiere a la colonia de Zarkov».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, ha llegado un mensaje del magos Tau-Fi-0098. Informa de que su investigación ha producido algunos resultados, y que por fin hay una posibilidad de asegurar las posesiones del Omnissiah. Creo que se refiere a la colonia de Zarkov».

languages.text: “舰长大人，收到贤者陶-斐-0098的讯息。他汇报称研究已获成果，并终于找到了确保欧姆尼赛亚财产安全的可能。我想他指的是扎尔科夫殖民地。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，收到贤者陶-斐-0098的讯息。他汇报称研究已获成果，并终于找到了确保欧姆尼赛亚财产安全的可能。我想他指的是扎尔科夫殖民地。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain, eine Nachricht von Magos Tau-Phi-0098 ist eingetroffen. Seine Forschungen haben gewissen Fortschritte erzielt, und es besteht endlich eine Chance, die Besitztümer des Omnissiah zu sichern. Ich glaube, er meint damit die Kolonie auf Zarkov."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, eine Nachricht von Magos Tau-Phi-0098 ist eingetroffen. Seine Forschungen haben gewissen Fortschritte erzielt, und es besteht endlich eine Chance, die Besitztümer des Omnissiah zu sichern. Ich glaube, er meint damit die Kolonie auf Zarkov."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, Magos Tau-Fi-0098'den bir mesaj geldi. Araştırmasının birtakım sonuçlar verdiğini ve nihayet Hermesih'in mülklerini güvence altına alma şansı olduğunu bildiriyor. Zarkov'daki koloniden bahsettiğini sanıyorum."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, Magos Tau-Fi-0098'den bir mesaj geldi. Araştırmasının birtakım sonuçlar verdiğini ve nihayet Hermesih'in mülklerini güvence altına alma şansı olduğunu bildiriyor. Zarkov'daki koloniden bahsettiğini sanıyorum."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, nous avons reçu un message du magos Tau-Phi-0098. Il rapporte que ses recherches ont porté leurs fruits et que nous avons enfin une chance de sécuriser les biens de l'Omnimessie. Je crois qu'il fait référence à la colonie de Zarkov. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, nous avons reçu un message du magos Tau-Phi-0098. Il rapporte que ses recherches ont porté leurs fruits et que nous avons enfin une chance de sécuriser les biens de l'Omnimessie. Je crois qu'il fait référence à la colonie de Zarkov. »
